pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and modernize the framework stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the Lombok dependency, likely in favor of Java 21 records or explicit boilerplate.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HttpSecurity configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: The old API methods like authorizeRequests(), csrf().disable(), and formLogin() are deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compilation errors or runtime failures if not updated.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated mvcMatchers with authorizeHttpRequests lambda syntax.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: mvcMatchers is deprecated in favor of requestMatchers within the authorizeHttpRequests lambda in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: The old csrf().disable() syntax is deprecated; Spring Security 6 requires the lambda form csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable()).

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Update FormLogin configuration to use lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: The old formLogin() fluent builder is deprecated; Spring Security 6 requires the lambda form formLogin(login -> login...).

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Update Logout configuration to use lambda DSL.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: The old logout() fluent builder is deprecated; Spring Security 6 requires the lambda form logout(logout -> logout...).

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Update HttpBasic configuration to use lambda DSL with withDefaults.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: The old httpBasic() fluent builder is deprecated; Spring Security 6 requires the lambda form httpBasic(withDefaults()).

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Add import for Spring Security Customizer.withDefaults static method.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: The new lambda-based configuration uses withDefaults() which requires an explicit static import.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Replace javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without the jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated @RequestMapping with specific @PostMapping annotation for cleaner code.
Remove unused static import for RequestMethod.POST since @PostMapping is used instead.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor as it is redundant when only one constructor exists.
Remove unused @Autowired import after removing the annotation from the constructor.
Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: Compilation failure: package 'javax.servlet' does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), causing compilation errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/c.general_idea: Replace verbose @RequestMapping annotation with the more concise @GetMapping annotation.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/eazybytes/eazyschool/m.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.
